profession: Emissary of Peace and Trade Relations
vita: Hailing from the neutral Vel'Ar homeworld, I am an experienced envoy known for my fluency in multiple dialects. My travels across star systems have taught me that understanding is key to prosperity and harmony.
portrait_prompt: An elegant velvet-clad Vel'Ar with translucent skin reflecting the iridescent hues of their homeworld, standing tall amidst a backdrop of twinkling stars in an expansive cosmic vista. They hold out hands as if to bridge worlds together.
